scripts.guard: node scripts/project-guard.mjs --working && node scripts/architecture-guard.mjs && node scripts/skill-guard.mjs --working
scripts.harness:test: node --test test/*.test.mjs && node scripts/skill-tree.mjs cases verify
scripts.check: node --check scripts/build-platform-installer.mjs && node --check scripts/fetch-node-runtime.mjs && node --check projects/core/admin-panel/server.mjs && node --check projects/core/admin-panel/setup-page.mjs && npm run check -w personal-agent-node && npm run check -w open-agent-bridge
scripts.test: npm run native:test && npm run harness:test && npm run test -w personal-agent-node && npm run test -w private-site-edge && npm run test -w open-agent-bridge
